text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and I are on our way back from a
day out.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to believe the day is over already. Time
truly does fly when you're having fun...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I had a wonderful time, but that has been enough
enjoyment for one day. I ought to get ready to
for tomorrow's cla—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that moment, something in the supermarket
window catches Symboli Rudolf's attention.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm... Stuffed peppers do sound awfully good...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Would you mind waiting here a moment? I'm just
going to buy ingredients for tomorrow's lunch.
choice_data_list: I can give you a hand.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, if you're certain, I could hardly refuse.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the help. I can turn these into quite
the nutritious lunch tomorrow.
choice_data_list: Do you always make your own lunch?
Do you always make your own lunch?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Usually, yes. As a Tracen Academy student, it's
my duty to monitor the food I consume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The food served in the cafeteria is designed to
meet our nutritional needs, of course...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But seeing as the student council office doubles
as a place to seek advice, I would prefer not to
vacate it during the lunch period.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
To that end, I try to bring a packed lunch to eat
there whenever I can.
choice_data_list: I wanna see what you cook!
That must be a lot of work.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hah! What an odd thing to fixate on. I cannot
imagine it would be especially interesting to look
at...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I would also be a little embarrassed to simply waft
my lunch under your nose. What do you say I
make you one too?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You help me every day. I would only be returning
the favor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, cooking for one makes it remarkably
difficult to avoid wasting food.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I often find myself obliged to donate excess
portions to Brian and Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, they've told me this directly,
so I'll warn you in advance...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My lunches are known for looking quite plain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, I get the chance to try Symboli
Rudolf's cooking for myself. It won't win any
awards for presentation, but it tastes extremely
nutritious.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It can be onerous at times, but the benefits are
worth the effort.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For one thing, having a task before me first thing
in the morning helps me to wake up full of
purpose.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Against the temptations of slumber, I levy the
shield of diligence and the sword of appetite.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Oops.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... You're as perceptive as ever, I see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As you correctly deduced, I'm not a naturally
early riser.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I take measures to ensure that it doesn't affect my
responsibilities, but there's no changing my
constitution.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, this is strictly confidential information.
Nobody below vice-presidential level must know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's smile turns just a little
mischievous.
